Disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
Disclaimer.intro: Content is provided for educational and informational purposes only and should not be relied upon for financial decisions.

noFinancialAdvice.title: No financial advice
noFinancialAdvice.body: Nothing on this site constitutes financial, investment, tax, or legal advice, and nothing here creates an advisor-client relationship.

educationalOnly.title: Educational purposes only
educationalOnly.body: All content is for general education and discussion and does not replace professional advice.

noGuarantees.title: No guarantees of results
noGuarantees.body: Markets move, personal situations change, and outcomes vary. Past results, examples, or projections are not promises of future performance.

personalResponsibility.title: Personal responsibility
personalResponsibility.body: You are solely responsible for any decisions you make based on this content. Before acting, review your own situation and consult a qualified professional when appropriate.

externalLinks.title: External links disclaimer
externalLinks.body: This site may link to third-party websites for reference or convenience. Nine2Fire does not control those sites and is not responsible for their content, accuracy, or policies.
